title: Construct vertical gardens and green facades
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Construct vertical gardens and green facades demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan and prepare

pcs.text: Interpret vertical garden and green facade design plans and specifications, check permits and identify and resolve any discrepancies with designer and/or associated specialists if applicable
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret vertical garden and green facade design plans and specifications, check permits and identify and resolve any discrepancies with designer and/or associated specialists if applicable?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret vertical garden and green facade design plans and specifications, check permits and identify and resolve any discrepancies with designer and/or associated specialists if applicable.

pcs.text: Complete job safety and environmental analysis (JSEA) or Safe Work Method Statement (SWMS), identify potential hazards and apply control measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete job safety and environmental analysis (JSEA) or Safe Work Method Statement (SWMS), identify potential hazards and apply control measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete job safety and environmental analysis (JSEA) or Safe Work Method Statement (SWMS), identify potential hazards and apply control measures.

pcs.text: Determine job priorities, and sequence job tasks in consultation with others on site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job priorities, and sequence job tasks in consultation with others on site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job priorities, and sequence job tasks in consultation with others on site.

pcs.text: Calculate material and component quantities and check material availability with suppliers
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate material and component quantities and check material availability with suppliers?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate material and component quantities and check material availability with suppliers.

pcs.text: Schedule delivery and discuss site access and method of locating material onsite with appropriate persons
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Schedule delivery and discuss site access and method of locating material onsite with appropriate persons?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Schedule delivery and discuss site access and method of locating material onsite with appropriate persons.

pcs.text: Select plant, equipment and tools, check for serviceability and rectify and report any faults, and confirm required operator certifications, if applicable
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select plant, equipment and tools, check for serviceability and rectify and report any faults, and confirm required operator certifications, if applicable?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select plant, equipment and tools, check for serviceability and rectify and report any faults, and confirm required operator certifications, if applicable.

pcs.text: Select, correctly fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, correctly fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, correctly fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE).

pcs.text: Check delivered materials and components for conformity, and report any discrepancies or damage to appropriate person
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check delivered materials and components for conformity, and report any discrepancies or damage to appropriate person?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check delivered materials and components for conformity, and report any discrepancies or damage to appropriate person.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan and prepare

elements.title: Construct vertical garden

pcs.text: Set out and mark position, levels and fixing points appropriate for the selected vertical garden configuration
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set out and mark position, levels and fixing points appropriate for the selected vertical garden configuration?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set out and mark position, levels and fixing points appropriate for the selected vertical garden configuration.

pcs.text: Confirm waterproofing installation to the specified area by specialist waterproofer using approved materials and methods has been inspected and certified
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm waterproofing installation to the specified area by specialist waterproofer using approved materials and methods has been inspected and certified?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm waterproofing installation to the specified area by specialist waterproofer using approved materials and methods has been inspected and certified.

pcs.text: Install irrigation and drip tray system, and check for leaks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install irrigation and drip tray system, and check for leaks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install irrigation and drip tray system, and check for leaks.

pcs.text: Install lighting and/or air flow equipment according to specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install lighting and/or air flow equipment according to specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install lighting and/or air flow equipment according to specifications.

pcs.text: Fix vertical garden panels according to manufacturers’ specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Fix vertical garden panels according to manufacturers’ specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fix vertical garden panels according to manufacturers’ specifications.

pcs.text: Install and finish growing media to specified levels
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install and finish growing media to specified levels?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install and finish growing media to specified levels.

pcs.text: Plant specified vegetation to meet design patterns according to designer and/or supplier establishment information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plant specified vegetation to meet design patterns according to designer and/or supplier establishment information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plant specified vegetation to meet design patterns according to designer and/or supplier establishment information.

pcs.text: Select and install growing media to specified depth, consolidate and finish height

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and install growing media to specified depth, consolidate and finish height.

pcs.text: Plant or install specified plants following designer and/or supplier establishment information

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plant or install specified plants following designer and/or supplier establishment information.
